title: Brooms Unofficial
description: An unofficial port of Brooms, adding balanced enchantable brooms to Minecraft. Fly around the world!
body:
This mod is an unofficial 1.20.1+ Forge/NeoForge port of the [Brooms](https://github.com/EterDelta/Brooms) mod, following the MIT license.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39217e01c2fbad2dc45fb08cfa42657b21530008.png)

It adds an enchantable broom that is very easy to craft and use: right-click to place it on the ground, right-click on the Broom Entity to mount, press Space to take off.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20834e3081212e7ac69a02022d1f3785090699ce_0.webp)

EnchantmentBooks about brooms might appear in loot chests from NeoForge 1.21.1-1.2.0.
Please do not report any issues to the original author.
